source_reference.name: GSD / get-shit-done
source_reference.notes: Adapt concepts only: context engineering, spec-driven phases, compact work packets, and verification gates. Do not vendor upstream runtime code.

phases.purpose: Convert the user's goal into a compact, testable work packet.
Load only the files needed for the selected specialist and avoid context rot.
Make bounded code/config/doc changes with clear ownership.
Prove the change with deterministic checks before final handoff.
Leave compact operational notes for the next agent or operator.

guardrails: No secrets, private keys, Telegram updates, or raw runtime logs in external prompts.
No direct trading execution from agent-generated text.
Keep risk engine, ledger, HMM, and MODE guardrails as the source of truth.
Prefer adapters, config cards, and docs over vendoring external agent frameworks.
Every adapter or workflow rule must have focused tests or an explicit residual-risk note.
